summary: Merchant AI Features Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: 12/12 UI elements verified. New Visura Camerale and Scansiona Menu AI features properly integrated in merchant dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented (visura-upload, menu-scan-upload, manage-menu-btn, send-notification-btn, referred-users-btn)
Auth validation returns 403 with 'Not authenticated' (consistent with app pattern)
File type validation happens before merchant status check - acceptable order
Non-merchant users correctly get 403 'Non sei un merchant' when sending valid image
OpenAI API key properly configured in backend .env (GPT-5-mini model)
Wallet balance correctly displayed on merchant dashboard (38.88 UP for test user)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded merchant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant AI features fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/merchant/ai/upload-visura - requires auth (403 if missing), requires merchant status (403 if non-merchant), rejects non-image files (400). Does NOT process actual images in tests (avoids OpenAI costs). 2) POST /api/merchant/ai/scan-menu - same validation pattern. Checks wallet balance >= 1 UP before processing. Deducts 1 UP per dish extracted. 3) Frontend MerchantDashboardPage correctly shows both new AI sections with proper data-testid attributes. 4) Visura section has upload area with AI extraction description. 5) Menu scan section shows '1 UP/piatto' badge, lists AI capabilities (extract dishes, translate 5 languages, estimate calories, health info). 6) Original merchant features (QR code, Gestisci Menu, notifications, referred users) all still visible. 7) Wallet displays correct balance (38.88 UP for test merchant). 8) admin@test.com is NOT a merchant (is_merchant=false) - use for non-merchant testing. 9) luca.bianchi@test.com IS a merchant - cannot use for non-merchant testing.

verified_features.POST /api/merchant/ai/upload-visura merc: PASS - Returns 403 'Non sei un merchant' for admin user
verified_features.POST /api/merchant/ai/upload-visura file: PASS - Returns 400 'Solo immagini sono accettate' for text/pdf
verified_features.POST /api/merchant/ai/scan-menu merchant: PASS - Returns 403 'Non sei un merchant' for admin user
verified_features.POST /api/merchant/ai/scan-menu file typ: PASS - Returns 400 'Solo immagini sono accettate' for text files
verified_features.GET /api/merchants/me: PASS - Returns merchant data with business_name, category, qr_code
verified_features.GET /api/menu/my-items: PASS - Returns menu items list for restaurant merchant
verified_features.GET /api/merchants/categories/list: PASS - Returns category list including Ristorante
verified_features.Frontend Visura Camerale section: PASS - Title and upload area visible
verified_features.Frontend Scansiona Menu section: PASS - Title, 1UP/piatto badge, feature list visible
